channel.title: Posts on Satpreet H. Singh
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Satpreet H. Singh

item.description: Checklist/Gotchas for Applied Machine Learning Projects Data leakage: Is prediction accuracy >99%? You probably have data-leakage! Check if the training data is leaking into the test data (i.e. train-test split is broken) Alternatively, check if the target variable is included in the features. (This would show up in training accuracy of >99% too) Time-series: Train-test split should be such that test data is later in time compared to training data.
